prompt:
A controlled precipitation staging setup on a chemistry bench, with two small reagent containers, a sample vial, pipettes, and an order-of-addition card laid out neatly on a spill tray. The scene should clearly communicate stoichiometric preparation and deliberate sequencing, with clean glassware and measured aliquots ready for a controlled reaction.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future lab aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic glass and liquid textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the arrangement centered and tidy so it reads clearly as a DSPACE chemistry setup artifact.
